steps.title: Mark simultaneous contrast
steps.content: The sentence compares two findings from the same analysis: negative adjectives evolve most rapidly, while negative nouns evolve most slowly. The relationship is a concurrent contrast, not similarity, cause, or time sequence.

steps.title: Reject causal and time shifts
steps.content: B signals similarity, C signals consequence, and D signals a later event. None fits two contrasting results reported from the same study. The needed transition introduces a separate finding happening in the same context. The answer is A.
